title: Personal website establishes comprehensive academic record
excerpt: Gengchen Mai's personal website provides a complete academic timeline from Wuhan University through current positions at UT Austin and Google Research.
caption: This establishes the full educational and career trajectory with direct first-party documentation.
visualText: 2024 · Comprehensive CV and research profile documenting education, positions, and research contributions.

title: UT Austin faculty profile confirms current position
excerpt: The official UT Austin Department of Geography and the Environment faculty page documents Mai's appointment as Assistant Professor starting June 1, 2024.
caption: This provides institutional verification of current position and research focus areas.
visualText: 2024 · Official university record of faculty appointment and research specializations.

title: SEAI Lab website documents research program
excerpt: The Spatially Explicit Artificial Intelligence Lab website details Mai's research group, ongoing projects, and team members at UT Austin.
caption: This establishes the research program and lab leadership at UT Austin.
visualText: 2024 · Lab website documenting research focus on GeoAI, geo-foundation models, and geographic knowledge graphs.

title: NSF grant announcement confirms research funding
excerpt: Official announcement of $300,000 NSF grant for research on measuring and mitigating geographic bias in AI models and foundation models.
caption: This documents significant research funding and validates research direction in trustworthy GeoAI.
visualText: September 2025 · $300,000 award for geographic bias research in AI models.

title: UCSB profile documents doctoral research
excerpt: Graduate student profile at UCSB Geography documents Ph.D. research focus on Geographic Question Answering and Spatially-Explicit Machine Learning, along with internships at Esri, Apple Maps, and Google X.
caption: This establishes the graduate research foundation and industry connections during doctoral studies.
visualText: 2020 · Ph.D. student profile documenting research at STKO Lab and UCSB Spatial Center.

title: UGA profile documents first faculty position
excerpt: University of Georgia AI Institute profile documents Mai's position as Assistant Professor in Geography with affiliations in Computer Science and the AI Institute.
caption: This establishes the first faculty appointment and interdisciplinary connections.
visualText: 2023 · Faculty profile at UGA AI Institute documenting position and research focus.

title: AAG Nystrom Award recognizes research contributions
excerpt: The 2023 AAG Nystrom Award was given for research on 'Towards general-purpose representation learning of polygonal geometries,' recognizing significant contributions to geographic information science.
caption: This documents professional recognition and validates research impact in the GeoAI community.
visualText: 2023 · Professional recognition for research on polygonal geometry representation learning.
